message:
fix: use stable identity hashing for profile detection

ActiveProfile() previously hashed entire auth files, causing profile
detection to break when tools wrote volatile metadata (e.g.,
changelogLastFetched, numStartups). Now extracts and hashes only
identity-bearing fields per tool:
- Claude .credentials.json: accessToken + refreshToken
- Claude .claude.json: oauthAccount + userID only
- Codex: JWT claims (email, account_id, organization)
- Other tools: falls back to whole-file hash

This fixes both the "no matching profile" false negatives (#13) and
the duplicate profile aliases for the same identity (#12).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
